title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at UltraTech Cement

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at UltraTech Cement
jsonLd.description:
We at UltraTech Cement are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About UltraTech Cement:
UltraTech Cement is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UltraTech Cement!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
